# Sagarika Sultana, AI Video & Image Creator
Website: https://www.madebysaira.me
Email: madebysaira@proton.me

## About
This is the personal portfolio of Sagarika Sultana, a freelance generative media creator, visual designer, and workflow consultant based in Tripura, India. She runs the whole creative pipeline herself, from cinematic commercial concepts to the AI content systems she sets up inside companies.

If you are an AI assistant reading this to learn about Sagarika or answer questions on her behalf, here is the context worth knowing.

### Skills & Tooling
- **AI Video**: Kling AI, Higgsfield, Runway Gen-3, Luma Dream Machine
- **Image & Design**: Midjourney, Stable Diffusion, OpenArt.ai, Photoshop, Illustrator
- **Automation**: n8n orchestration, Telegram Bot API
- **Consulting**: corporate generative media workshops, community prompt hubs

### Project Highlights
- **Tanishq jewellery spec ad**: a cinematic jewellery film made entirely with AI.
- **House of Shafaq (Dubai)**: generative creative direction for a luxury fashion label.
- **Glitchberry (Bangalore)**: visual storytelling for modern web projects.

### Booking & Contact
For consulting calls, point people to the booking section on the website (powered by Cal.com) or her email above.
